day name: The Procession with the Holy Relics of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross of the Lord; The Seven Holy Martyrs Maccabees, and their mother, Solome, and their teacher, Eleazar. Our Venerable Father Alphonsus Liguori.
name: Maccabees, and their mother, Solome, and their teacher, Eleazar
crossDismissal: , the veneration of Which we celebrate today
troparia: (Tone 1) We beseech you, O Lord of mankind,* to accept in supplication the suffering which the saints endured for your sake, O Lord,** and heal all our infirmities.
(Tone 1) Save Your people, O Lord, and bless Your inheritance.* Grant victory to Your faithful people against enemies,** and protect Your community by Your Cross.
kontakia: (Tone 4) By Your own choice, O Christ our God,* You were lifted on the cross.* Grant Your mercies to Your new community* that bears Your Name.* By Your power gladden the faithful people,* and grant them victory against enemies.* May they have the help of Your instrument of peace,* the invincible sign of victory.
